metadata.description: A collection of plan review and engineering retrospective skills for Claude Code

plugins.name: plan-ceo-review
plugins.description: CEO/founder-level plan review with scope expansion, maintenance, and reduction modes

plugins.name: plan-eng-review
plugins.description: Engineering manager-level review focusing on architecture, code quality, testing, and performance

plugins.name: retro
plugins.description: Weekly engineering retrospective based on commit history and code quality metrics
